§6Latex§f

§aA cheap, natural polymer alternative to rubber for early industrialization.§f

Latex is a useful early-game material. It can be crafted from §bdandelions§f (2×2 grid) at a crafting table, or automated by pressing §bjungle wood§f with a flat stamp in the burner press or electric press. Smelt the latex ball into a §blatex bar§f for use in recipes.

§6Uses§f:
§b• Conveyor belts§f (cheaper alternative to rubber)
§b• Ore acidizer§f: latex bar + sour gas → rubber
§b• Various early machines and components

§eTip§f: Set up an automated tree farm with a press for infinite latex.
